Script.name: GaldamUI
Script.script:
GaldamUI = GaldamUI or {} if GaldamUI._handlers then for _, id in ipairs(GaldamUI._handlers) do pcall(killAnonymousEventHandler, id) end end GaldamUI._handlers = {} local PANEL_W = 0.22 local CSS_ON = "background-color: rgba(34,84,116,245); border:2px solid #4fa3c7; border-radius:6px; color:#eaf6fb; font-size:26px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';" local CSS_OFF = "background: qlineargradient(x1:0, y1:0, x2:1, y2:1, stop:0.42 rgba(20,13,15,255), stop:0.46 #cc2b2b, stop:0.54 #cc2b2b, stop:0.58 rgba(20,13,15,255)); border:2px solid #7a2e2e; border-radius:6px; color:#9a7478; font-size:26px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';" local CSS_ACT = "background-color: rgba(38,70,48,245); border:2px solid #5fae6f; border-radius:6px; color:#eafbea; font-size:26px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';" function GaldamUI.build() if GaldamUI.panel then GaldamUI.panel:hide() end GaldamUI.panel = Geyser.Container:new({name="GaldamPanel", x="-22%", y=0, width="22%", height="100%"}) GaldamUI.info = Geyser.Label:new({name="GaldamInfo", x=0, y=0, width="100%", height=84}, GaldamUI.panel) GaldamUI.info:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(15,25,35,235); border:1px solid #2a4a5a; border-radius:6px; color:#cfe8f0; font-size:26px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';") GaldamUI.info:echo("
갯담마을
") local gy = 84 local function gauge(name, label, color) local g = Geyser.Gauge:new({name=name, x=0, y=gy, width="100%", height=28}, GaldamUI.panel) g.front:setStyleSheet("background-color:"..color.."; border-radius:5px;") g.back:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(40,40,40,200); border-radius:5px;") g.text:setStyleSheet("color:#ffffff; font-size:20px; padding-left:6px;") g:setValue(100,100,""..label..""); gy = gy + 30; return g end GaldamUI.hp = gauge("GaldamHP", "체력", "#c0392b") GaldamUI.thirst = gauge("GaldamThi", "목마름", "#2471a3") GaldamUI.hunger = gauge("GaldamHun", "배고픔", "#d68910") GaldamUI.stress = gauge("GaldamStr", "스트레스", "#f1c40f") -- 수배: GTA식 별 6개 (티어 기반: 1~30/31~60/61~100/101~140/141~170/171~200) GaldamUI.wanted = Geyser.Label:new({name="GaldamWan", x=0, y=gy, width="100%", height=28}, GaldamUI.panel) GaldamUI.wanted:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(40,40,40,200); border-radius:5px; color:#cfe8f0; font-size:20px; padding-left:8px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignVCenter';") GaldamUI.wanted:echo("수배 ☆☆☆☆☆☆") gy = gy + 30 -- 클릭 d-pad (못 가는 방향은 어둡게+취소선) GaldamUI.dpad = Geyser.Container:new({name="GaldamDpad", x=0, y=250, width="100%", height=200}, GaldamUI.panel) GaldamUI.dirBtns = {} local function dbtn(nm, name, emoji, cmd, aliases, x, y) local b = Geyser.Label:new({name=nm, x=x, y=y, width="32%", height=58}, GaldamUI.dpad) b:setClickCallback(function() send(cmd) end) local onL = "
"..emoji.." "..name.."
" local offL = "
"..name.."
" b:setStyleSheet(CSS_OFF); b:echo(offL) table.insert(GaldamUI.dirBtns, {btn=b, aliases=aliases, onL=onL, offL=offL}) return b end dbtn("dpUp", "위", "🔼", "위", {"위","up","u","상"}, "0%", 0) dbtn("dpN", "북", "⬆️", "북", {"북","north","n"}, "34%", 0) dbtn("dpIn", "들어가기", "🚪", "들어가기", {"들어가기","in","enter","안","입구"}, "68%", 0) dbtn("dpW", "서", "⬅️", "서", {"서","west","w"}, "0%", 66) dbtn("dpE", "동", "➡️", "동", {"동","east","e"}, "68%", 66) dbtn("dpDn", "아래", "🔽", "아래", {"아래","down","d","하"}, "0%", 132) dbtn("dpS", "남", "⬇️", "남", {"남","south","s"}, "34%", 132) dbtn("dpOut", "나가기", "🚪", "나가기", {"나가기","out","밖","출구","exit"}, "68%", 132) -- 보기 (중앙, 항상 활성) do local lk = Geyser.Label:new({name="dpLook", x="34%", y=66, width="32%", height=58}, GaldamUI.dpad) lk:setStyleSheet(CSS_ACT); lk:echo("
🔍 보기
") lk:setClickCallback(function() send("look") end) end -- 액션 행 (항상 활성) GaldamUI.act = Geyser.Container:new({name="GaldamAct", x=0, y=458, width="100%", height=52}, GaldamUI.panel) local function abtn(nm, lbl, cmd, x, w) local b = Geyser.Label:new({name=nm, x=x, y=0, width=w, height=48}, GaldamUI.act) b:setStyleSheet(CSS_ACT) b:echo("
"..lbl.."
") b:setClickCallback(function() send(cmd) end) end abtn("acSearch", "🔎 찾기 (수색)", "search", "0%", "100%") -- 지도: 별도 플로팅 창 pcall(function() if not GaldamUI.mapWin then GaldamUI.mapWin = Geyser.UserWindow:new({name="갯담지도", width=520, height=430, x=900, y=620}) end GaldamUI.mapWin:setFontSize(14) GaldamUI.mapWin:cecho("\n 지도 없음") end) GaldamUI.built = true end function GaldamUI.layout() setBorderRight(math.floor((getMainWindowSize()) * PANEL_W)) end function GaldamUI.setExits(elist) if not GaldamUI.dirBtns then return end local avail = {} for _, e in ipairs(elist or {}) do avail[tostring(e)] = true end for _, d in ipairs(GaldamUI.dirBtns) do local on = false for _, al in ipairs(d.aliases) do if avail[al] then on = true; break end end if on then d.btn:setStyleSheet(CSS_ON); d.btn:echo(d.onL) else d.btn:setStyleSheet(CSS_OFF); d.btn:echo(d.offL) end end end function GaldamUI.onRoom() local r = gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Room if not (GaldamUI.built and r) then return end GaldamUI.info:echo(string.format("
%s
%s
", r.name or "?", r.area or "")) GaldamUI.setExits(r.exits or {}) end function GaldamUI.onVitals() local v = gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Vitals if not (GaldamUI.built and v) then return end if v.hp then GaldamUI.hp:setValue(tonumber(v.hp) or 0, tonumber(v.hp_max) or 100, "체력 "..tostring(v.hp).."/"..tostring(v.hp_max).."") end if v.thirst then local t=tonumber(v.thirst) or 0; GaldamUI.thirst:setValue(math.min(t,500),500,string.format("목마름 %d",math.floor(t))) end if v.hunger then local h=tonumber(v.hunger) or 0; GaldamUI.hunger:setValue(math.min(h,500),500,string.format("배고픔 %d",math.floor(h))) end if v.stress then local s=tonumber(v.stress) or 0; GaldamUI.stress:setValue(math.min(s,500),500,string.format("스트레스 %d",math.floor(s))) end if v.wanted then local w = tonumber(v.wanted) or 0 local tier = (w>=171 and 6) or (w>=141 and 5) or (w>=101 and 4) or (w>=61 and 3) or (w>=31 and 2) or (w>=1 and 1) or 0 GaldamUI.wanted:echo("수배 "..string.rep("★",tier)..""..string.rep("☆",6-tier).."") end end function GaldamUI.onMap() local d = gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Map if not (GaldamUI.built and GaldamUI.mapWin and d) then return end GaldamUI.mapWin:clear() if d.has == 1 and d.grid then local raw = d.grid:gsub("<>", "\27"):gsub("<>", "\n") GaldamUI.mapWin:decho(ansi2decho(raw)) else GaldamUI.mapWin:cecho("\n 지도 없음 (갯담 지도 필요)") end end if not GaldamUI.built then GaldamUI.build() end GaldamUI.layout() table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Room", function() GaldamUI.onRoom() end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Char.Vitals", function() GaldamUI.onVitals() end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Map", function() GaldamUI.onMap() end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysWindowResizeEvent", function() GaldamUI.layout() end)) GaldamUI.onRoom(); GaldamUI.onVitals(); GaldamUI.onMap()
